# WAXAPP — robots.txt optimizado para SEO
# https://waxapp.mx

# Googlebot: máxima crawleabilidad
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Allow: /tienda
Allow: /catalogo
Allow: /producto/
Allow: /blog/
Allow: /blog
Allow: /marcas
Allow: /sobre-nosotros
Allow: /contacto
Allow: /afiliados
Allow: /sitemap.xml
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /cliente
Disallow: /mi-cuenta
Disallow: /checkout
Disallow: /reset-password
Disallow: /api/

# Bingbot
User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /cliente
Disallow: /mi-cuenta
Disallow: /checkout
Disallow: /reset-password
Crawl-delay: 1

# Crawlers sociales — siempre permitir para OG tags y previews
User-agent: Twitterbot
Allow: /
User-agent: facebookexternalhit
Allow: /
User-agent: LinkedInBot
Allow: /
User-agent: WhatsApp
Allow: /
User-agent: TelegramBot
Allow: /
User-agent: Slackbot
Allow: /

# Bots SEO — limitar velocidad
User-agent: SemrushBot
Crawl-delay: 10
User-agent: AhrefsBot
Crawl-delay: 10
User-agent: MJ12bot
Disallow: /
User-agent: DotBot
Disallow: /
User-agent: PetalBot
Disallow: /

# Regla general
User-agent: *
Allow: /
Allow: /tienda
Allow: /catalogo
Allow: /producto/
Allow: /blog/
Allow: /blog
Allow: /marcas
Allow: /sobre-nosotros
Allow: /contacto
Allow: /afiliados
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /cliente
Disallow: /mi-cuenta
Disallow: /checkout
Disallow: /reset-password
Disallow: /api/
Crawl-delay: 1

# Sitemaps
Sitemap: https://waxapp.mx/sitemap.xml
Sitemap: https://vapewax.com.mx/sitemap.xml
Sitemap: https://extraccionwax.com/sitemap.xml
Sitemap: https://nytjvcykmimblubegxjq.supabase.co/functions/v1/generate-sitemap
